description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, industrial design with a robust, angular body and a prominent barrel assembly. The main housing is constructed from a dark blue-gray material with metallic accents and reinforced panels, giving it a heavy-duty appearance. Two large, vented structures sit atop the rear, possibly for cooling or power regulation, and are highlighted with yellow-orange details. The grip and trigger area are ergonomically shaped, with a ribbed handle for secure holding. A series of thick, coiled cables run from the rear to the midsection, suggesting an energy or pneumatic mechanism. The overall aesthetic is high-tech, with visible bolts, layered armor plating, and a compact, tactical form factor suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A futuristic, heavy-duty rifle with a dark blue-gray body, yellow-orange highlights, and prominent coiled cables, featuring a robust, angular design and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hexagonal muzzle, dual vented structures on top, and the ribbed barrel extension on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, the ergonomic grip, coiled cables, and layered armor plating.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the dual vented structures, coiled cables, and the back end of the grip and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the opposite side of the rifle, with visible bolts, cables, and the detailed grip.
